```{r}
#| label: preparation chunks
#| echo: false
knitr::read_chunk("../R/preparations.R")
```

# Preparations

Load the necessary R packages

```{r}
#| label: libraries
#| results: markup
#| eval: true
#| echo: true
#| cache: false
#| message: false
```

Prepare directory structure

```{r}
#| label: prepare directories
#| results: markup
#| eval: true
#| echo: true
#| cache: false
#| message: false
```
